apps.name: CueDetat
apps.description: The sort of IRL pool shot visualization billiards app you've always thought should just... fucking... exist already.

apps.name: GraffitiXR
apps.description: An offline Android app for street artists, using AR to project images onto walls using a confidence-based voxel mapping system.

apps.name: AzNavRail
apps.description: A Jetpack menu and composables, the way I like it. Just me. Cuz it's for me. Me. ME! MEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE!!!!!!!!!!!!

apps.name: BarBacker
apps.description: A digital paging system for bartenders and barbacks in high-volume (and loud, too) environments.

apps.name: IDEaz
apps.description: Mobile development that feels like it's just you and your IDEaz -- The Post-Code IDE for Android.

apps.name: TheLexorcist
apps.description: The Lexorcist is an Android app for legalitarians to parse, track, and manage case evidence.

apps.name: Liperty
apps.description: On-device lip reading, fine-tuned to the user.

apps.name: HalfHashedKitty
apps.description: GUI for hashcat and related tools

apps.name: QaRd
apps.description: QaRd: Design your QR code widget, shared like a digital business card or contact.

apps.name: BarCodeNcrypt
apps.description: I had this dream where, in the middle of our conversation, Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson pulled out his keys and scanned the barcode on a coupon club key fob.     "What was that?" I asked.     "Oh," The Rock showed me his fob.     "This is my password."

apps.name: QuicLoc
apps.description: Location sharing without the battery drain nor other creepinesses, for Android.

apps.name: MagNom
apps.description: An Android app to interface with Magspoof v4 and similar hardware, integrating  magstrip reading and recording tools like AudioSpoof.

apps.name: ReUp
apps.description: A gentle cognitive behavioral helper in Android app form.

apps.name: LeFauxPass
apps.description: Unlimited free streetcar, ferry, and bus passes in New Orleans.

apps.name: Click
apps.description: A simple android app that allows the user to choose a button to press, tap the fingerprint scanner not located on the screen, or tap the camera lens itself to be able to take a picture.

apps.name: WifiHaqueur
apps.description: Wifi Haqueur is a blunt instrument you can whack a router with using the force of a brute.
